input.user_input: Does this software licensing agreement grant the licensee the right to sublicense? Where in the document does it say that?

actual: Please provide or upload the software licensing agreement you would like me to review. Once you share the document, I can analyze it to determine whether it grants the right to sublicense and point you to the specific section where that is stated.
